policy.scope: Language-only rewrite of the three public lender decks.
policy.evidenceRule: Figures, evidence classifications, citations, scope limits and caveats remain source-locked.
policy.failClosedRule: The builder verifies every source shape anchor, exact source string and table cell before mutation.

exactTranslations.Patentista pankkikelpoiseksi\ntodistelup:
From patent to a lender-ready
evidence package
exactTranslations.Vahvistettu näyttö erotetaan tuetusta ti: Confirmed evidence is separated from supported information, assumptions and missing evidence.
exactTranslations.Ei Pixan Oy:n virallinen kanta · ei arvo: Not Pixan Oy's official position · not a valuation, investment, lending or legal opinion
exactTranslations.Rahoitettavuus on mahdollisuus, ei nykyi: Financeability remains possible—not yet a conclusion
exactTranslations.Viralliset patentti- ja oikeuslähteet oi: Official patent and court sources justify further diligence; they do not yet establish collateral value or repayment.
exactTranslations.• EPO:n muutettu B2-patentti ja Saksan:
•  The amended EPO B2 patent and the German decisions form an unusually strong legal-evidence anchor.
•  The market dataset spans a 195-country research frame, but comparable retail value is not yet available.
•  A financing structure requires national rights, a claim-mapped-sales bridge, cash flow and an independent valuation.
exactTranslations.Avaa 90 päivän ehdollinen diligence, ei: Open a conditional 90-day diligence phase, not a final credit decision.
exactTranslations.Kolme perustetta jatkaa — ja kolme rajaa: Three reasons to proceed—and three reasons to wait
exactTranslations.Pankin tulee hinnoitella vain se osa näy: The lender should price only the evidence for which title, enforceability and cash flow have been confirmed.
exactTranslations.EPO pysytti patentin muutettuna: EPO maintained the patent in amended form
exactTranslations.Muu tuote, maa tai maksettu korvaus: Another product, country or paid damages
exactTranslations.Todennusketju katkeaa tällä hetkellä enn: The evidence chain currently breaks before cash flow
exactTranslations.Patentti → voimassa oleva maaoikeus → re: Patent → enforceable national right → relevant product → relevant sales → contract or judgment → payment → debt service.
exactTranslations.• Ketjun alku on osin vahvistettu viral:
•  The beginning of the chain is partly confirmed by official sources.
•  The product and sales link is confirmed only to a limited extent in the German judgment.
•  Evidence of contracts, payments, company finances and collateral value is missing from the public package.
exactTranslations.Yksi vahvistamaton lenkki voi muuttaa ni: One unconfirmed link can reduce nominal market value to zero in a realisable downside scenario.
exactTranslations.Patentoitu ratkaisu ohjaa lämmitystehoa: Resistance data drives the patented heating control
exactTranslations.Julkaistu patenttiselitys koskee sähkökä: The published patent specification concerns control of an electrically powered vaporiser by measuring heating-element resistance, selecting the corresponding power from stored data and controlling power delivered to the heater within defined user-adjustment limits.
exactTranslations.• Mittaus: lämmityselementin resistanss:
•  Measurement: heating-element resistance.
•  Data: stored resistance–power values.
•  Control: power delivered to the heater and the user-adjustment limits.
exactTranslations.Yleiskielinen kuvaus ei korvaa maakohtai: This plain-language description does not replace country-specific claim construction or product-specific claim analysis.
exactTranslations.B2-tekstin yhdeksän vaatimusta ovat arvi: The nine B2 claims are the starting point for review
exactTranslations.Jokainen vaatimuspiirre on osoitettava t: Every claim limitation must be evidenced; a feature list alone is insufficient.
exactTranslations.Miten ja milloin mitataan?: How and when is it measured?
exactTranslations.Tehosuhteen määritelty luonne: Defined nature of the power relationship
exactTranslations.Miten käyttöliittymä toteuttaa rajat?: How does the interface implement the limits?
exactTranslations.IP-historian ydintapahtumat ovat viralli: Core IP events are traceable to official records
exactTranslations.EPO:n keskitetty väite- ja valitusmenett: The central EPO opposition and appeal proceedings have concluded.
exactTranslations.Kansalliset post-grant-oikeudet elävät e: National post-grant rights remain separate from the central EPO proceedings.
exactTranslations.Perhejulkaisuja on 22 — voimassa olevien: 22 family publications do not prove enforceability
exactTranslations.Julkaisureitti on kartta, ei omistus- ta: The publication route is a map, not proof of title or validity.
exactTranslations.Asiamiehen maamatriisin tulee sisältää h: Counsel's country matrix should include proprietor, operative claims, renewal fee, receipt, encumbrances, UPC position and next deadline.
exactTranslations.Saksan ratkaisut ovat vahvaa näyttöä tar: German decisions are strong but narrowly scoped
exactTranslations.Saksan näyttö ei automaattisesti siirry: The German evidence does not automatically extend to another product, counterparty or country.
exactTranslations.Vaatimusten 1 ja 6 loukkaus tarkastellui: Infringement of claims 1 and 6 by the products examined
exactTranslations.Kiinan asia ei ole loukkausvoitto: The Chinese matter is not an infringement victory
exactTranslations.Julkinen sekundäärinen docket-tieto viit: Public secondary docket information points to an applicant-side re-examination of a rejected application.
exactTranslations.• Menettely luokitellaan review request:
•  The proceeding is classified as a review-request matter.
•  The official decision and detailed reasons were not obtained for the public package.
•  CN105764365B was later published as granted on 4 May 2021.
exactTranslations.Asiaa ei saa kuvata Kiinan loukkausoikeu: The matter must not be described as Chinese infringement litigation, a counterparty invalidity action or cash-flow evidence.
exactTranslations.Neljä ajankohtaista IP-hälytystä vaatii: Four current IP alerts require a documented owner
exactTranslations.Määräpäivävalvonta on vakuusarvon operat: Deadline monitoring is an operational collateral-value control, not an administrative detail.
exactTranslations.Vahvista maksu, kuitti ja uusi rekisteri: Confirm payment, receipt and an updated register extract
exactTranslations.Maksa 14. vuosimaksu ja arkistoi kuitti: Pay the year-14 renewal fee and archive the receipt
exactTranslations.Atlas kattaa maailman tutkimusrunkona, e: Atlas provides a global research frame, not yet market value
exactTranslations.Kattavuus tarkoittaa tutkimusrivejä; use: Coverage means research rows; official annual sales are missing for most countries.
exactTranslations.Luokat A–D kuvaavat evidenssikypsyyttä,: Grades A–D describe evidence maturity, not market size or commercial attractiveness.
exactTranslations.Viiden maan viralliset havainnot mittaav: Official observations from five countries measure different things
exactTranslations.Litroja, toimitusarvoja ja valmisteveroj: Litres, shipment values and excise taxes are not summed into one market.
exactTranslations.1.16 mrd CAD toimitusarvo; 1.252 milj. l: CAD 1.16bn shipment value; 1.252m litres of liquid
exactTranslations.Kanada on vahva toimitusmyynnin ankkuri,: Canada anchors shipment value, not retail value
exactTranslations.Virallinen koko vuoden havainto kattaa n: The official full-year observation covers four vaping product categories.
exactTranslations.Tukku-/vähittäismyyjille toimitettu arvo: Value shipped to wholesalers and retailers is not consumer sell-through; inventory, margin and channel must be reconciled.
exactTranslations.Saksan virallinen nestemäärä kasvoi, mut: Germany's liquid volume rose; value needs a price
exactTranslations.Verotettu nestemäärä ei sisällä laitteit: Taxed liquid volume excludes devices, tax-free and illicit trade and is not retail value.
exactTranslations.Saksan mallihaitari näyttää herkkyyden —: Germany's range is modelled—not observed sales
exactTranslations.Vuoden 2025 alustava määrä kerrotaan kol: The provisional 2025 volume is multiplied by three 2026 prices from one online shop. Confidence = low; devices and several channel/mix factors are missing.
exactTranslations.Kaupalliset globaaliarviot ovat sanity c: Global estimates are checks, not our estimate
exactTranslations.Haarukka on leveä, koska tuoterajaukset: The range is wide because product scopes and methods may differ.
exactTranslations.Arvioita verrataan keskenään. Niitä ei s: The estimates are compared with each other. They are not summed, and the range is not used automatically as a royalty base.
exactTranslations.Hyväksyttävä maailmanestimaatti tarvitse: A global estimate needs at least three comparable donor markets
exactTranslations.Nykyinen comparable consumer-retail dono: The current comparable consumer-retail donor count is 0; the hard gate is not met.
exactTranslations.• Sama tuoterajaus ja kalenterivuosi.\n:
•  The same product scope and calendar year.
•  Consumer retail value, not a shipment, tax or volume proxy.
•  Coverage across region and regulatory types, plus direct validation in major economies.
exactTranslations.Trianguloi kysyntä-, vero-, tulli-, yrit: Triangulate demand, tax, customs, company and price methods. Compare results; do not add alternative estimates together.
exactTranslations.Markkinan ja patentin väliin tarvitaan v: The market-to-patent bridge has five filters
exactTranslations.Vain alimman tason kassavirta voi palvel: Only bottom-level cash flow can service debt; the upper-level market cannot do so by itself.
exactTranslations.Mahdolliset asiakkaat ovat hypoteeseja,: Potential customers are hypotheses, not yet evidence
exactTranslations.Segmentointi johdetaan kaupallistamisrei: Commercialisation routes point to manufacturers, technology providers, and IP financiers or buyers.
exactTranslations.• Valmistajalle arvo voi olla lisenssi,:
•  For a manufacturer, value may be a licence, freedom to operate or settlement.
•  For a technology provider, value may be an integrable function or legal position.
•  For a financier, value is controllable, realisable cash flow and downside protection.
exactTranslations.Dokumentoi 10–15 haastattelua, päätöskri: Document 10–15 interviews, decision criteria, objections, budget and next step. The public evidence does not yet include these.
exactTranslations.Kilpailukartta on rakennettava neljälle: The competition map must cover four parallel levels
exactTranslations.Tekninen etu ei ole uskottava ennen kuin: A technical advantage is not credible until alternatives have been documented and sourced.
exactTranslations.Voiko suorituskyvyn toteuttaa eri tavall: Can the performance be achieved in a different way?
exactTranslations.Tuotevalidointi rakentuu katkeamattomaks: Product validation needs an unbroken evidence chain
exactTranslations.Osta oikeasta maasta ja ajankohdasta; do: Purchase in the correct country and period; document the seller, product version and serial details.
exactTranslations.Tallenna vastaanotto, säilytys, avaamine: Record receipt, storage, opening, imaging and file hashes.
exactTranslations.Tee riippumaton mittausprotokolla, raaka: Produce an independent measurement protocol, raw data and repeatability test.
exactTranslations.Mapita jokainen vaatimuspiirre todistees: Map every claim limitation to evidence and counsel's conclusion.
exactTranslations.Markkinamyynti voidaan kohdistaa vasta,: Market sales can be attributed only after product identity and claim mapping are controlled.
exactTranslations.Ei yhteydenottoa ilman maakohtaista omis: No outreach without country-specific title, validity, encumbrance and deadline information.
exactTranslations.Ei väitettä ilman tuotenäytettä, claim c: No assertion without a product sample, claim chart and documentation of the local act.
exactTranslations.Arvioi myynti, näyttö, vastapuoli, toimi: Assess sales, evidence, counterparty, jurisdiction, cost and recoverability.
exactTranslations.Neuvottele lisenssi-, sovinto-, luovutus: Negotiate licence, settlement, assignment or financing options under controlled conditions.
exactTranslations.Yhteydenottokirje ei automaattisesti kat: An outreach letter does not automatically interrupt limitation or prove service of notice.
exactTranslations.Kaupallistamisreitit eroavat kassavirran: Routes differ in cash flow, control and risk
exactTranslations.Valitse reitti vasta, kun oikeus, vastap: Choose a route only after the right, counterparty, cash flow and downside have been verified.
exactTranslations.Taloudellinen malli alkaa todennettavist: The financial model begins with verifiable inputs
exactTranslations.Nykyisestä julkisesta paketista ei voi j: A lender-ready NPV cannot be derived from the current public package.
exactTranslations.Herkkyydet on sidottava todellisiin risk: Sensitivities must be tied to real risks
exactTranslations.Taulukkoon ei syötetä prosentteja ennen: No percentages are entered before source evidence; this slide defines the scenario structure.
exactTranslations.Viisi kysymystä määrittää pankin seuraav: Five questions determine the lender's next decision
exactTranslations.Jos yksikin vastaus jää olennaisesti auk: If any one answer remains materially open, financing must be conditional and phased.
exactTranslations.Mitä tarkalleen omistetaan ja missä se o: What exactly is owned, and where is it enforceable?
exactTranslations.Mikä tuote täyttää mitkä vaatimuspiirtee: Which product satisfies which claim limitations?
exactTranslations.Mikä on todennettu relevantti myynti?: What are the verified relevant sales?
exactTranslations.Mistä ja milloin velanhoitokassa syntyy?: From where and when does debt-service cash arise?
exactTranslations.Mitä vakuus realisoi downside-tilanteess: What does the collateral realise in a downside case?
exactTranslations.Puuttuva aineisto priorisoituu vaikutuks: Missing evidence is prioritised by impact, not ease
exactTranslations.Julkinen paketti näyttää aukot; luottamu: The public package shows the gaps; confidential evidence belongs in an access-controlled data room.
exactTranslations.Tuotenäytteet, testit ja claim chartit: Product samples, tests and claim charts
exactTranslations.Tilinpäätös, velat, budjetti ja rahoitus: Financial statements, debt, budget and funding need
exactTranslations.90 päivän ohjelma muuttaa aukot päätöske: A 90-day programme turns gaps into controls
exactTranslations.Oikeusmatriisi, määräpäivät, omistus- ja: Rights matrix, deadlines, title and encumbrance review, and an index of company materials.
exactTranslations.Tuotedossierit, claim chartit, priorisoi: Product dossiers, claim charts, prioritised market sales and customer validation.
exactTranslations.Kassavirtamalli, riippumaton arvonmäärit: Cash-flow model, independent valuation, downside and term-sheet options.
exactTranslations.Hyväksy, rajaa, vaiheista tai hylkää rah: Approve, limit, phase or decline financing using explicit conditions and stop criteria.
exactTranslations.Paketti päivitetään samasta julkisesta l: The package is refreshed from the same public source data in every site release.
exactTranslations.Pankkikelpoinen tarina on todennusketju: A lender-ready case is an evidence chain — not the largest possible market number
exactTranslations.• Vahva lähtökohta: dokumentoitu patent:
•  Strong starting point: a documented patent core and official German legal evidence.
•  Critical open work: national rights, claim-mapped sales, cash flow and downside value.
•  Recommendation: conditional 90-day diligence, clear decision gates and an access-controlled data room.
•  This public package is a reviewable evidence map, not Pixan Oy's official position or a financing recommendation.
exactTranslations.Asiakkuus on vielä validoitava kolmessa: Customer demand still requires validation across three decision logics
exactTranslations.EPO pysytti patentin muutettuna; B2 julk: EPO maintained the patent in amended form; B2 was published on 24 April 2024.
exactTranslations.Hanki näyte, dokumentoi ketju ja tee asi: Obtain a sample, document the chain and prepare a counsel-reviewed claim chart.
exactTranslations.Hyväksyttyjä virallisia kansallisia cons: There are 0 accepted official national consumer-retail values. Atlas does not publish its own global estimate before the methodological gates are met.
exactTranslations.IP-ydin on dokumentoitu; maakohtainen kä: The IP core is documented; country-level usability still requires reconciliation
exactTranslations.Julkinen aineisto ei vahvista nimettyjä: The public evidence does not confirm named customers, pilots, purchase intentions or signed licences.
exactTranslations.Julkinen rekisteri nimeää Pixan Oy:n hal: The public register names Pixan Oy as proprietor. Current national validity, fees and encumbrances across the family have not yet been verified.
exactTranslations.Kaupallistaminen etenee porttien kautta,: Commercialisation proceeds through gates, not mass assertions
exactTranslations.Kilpailija-analyysi on pankin teknologia: Competitor analysis is a material open workstream in the lender's technology assessment.
exactTranslations.Kilpailu on erotettava vaihtoehtoisista: Distinguish competition, alternatives and patent risk
exactTranslations.Laaja markkinapuhe ei muutu pankkikelpoi: Broad market claims do not become lender-ready collateral without a country-specific rights, product, sales and cash-flow chain.
exactTranslations.Lisenssi, luovutus, sovinto vai oma käyt: Licence, assignment, settlement or own use?
exactTranslations.Mahdolliset segmentit ovat valmistajat,: Potential segments are manufacturers, technology providers, and IP financiers or buyers.
exactTranslations.Markkinakoko on tällä hetkellä haarukka: Market size is currently a range and a set of observations — not one number
exactTranslations.Mikä todennettu omaisuus ja kassavirta k: Which verified asset and cash flow covers the loan in a downside case?
exactTranslations.Näyte → hallussapitoketju → teardown → m: Sample → chain of custody → teardown → measurement data → claim chart → counsel review → relevant sales.
exactTranslations.Näytä downside/base/upside vasta, kun jo: Show downside/base/upside only after every bridge input has been documented.
exactTranslations.Ongelma on yhtä paljon evidenssissä kuin: The problem lies as much in the evidence as in the technology
exactTranslations.Onko suojan päällekkäisyys tai FTO-riski: Is there overlapping protection or FTO risk?
exactTranslations.Rahoitusarvioinnin tulee jäljittää jokai: The financing assessment must trace every material claim limitation to a product and country.
exactTranslations.Rahoituspäätös vasta neljän kriittisen a: Financing decision only after four critical gaps are closed
exactTranslations.Ratkaiseeko tuote saman ongelman eri tav: Does the product solve the same problem differently?
exactTranslations.Ratkaisu ohjaa höyrystimen tehoa mitatun: The solution controls vaporiser power based on measured resistance
exactTranslations.Saksan matalan luottamuksen nestemalli o: Germany's low-confidence liquid model is EUR 667.9m–1,654.6m; it must not be presented as observed sales.
exactTranslations.Taloudellinen malli on rakennettava läht: Evidence—not market share—must drive the model
exactTranslations.Tekninen erottautuminen on vaatimuksissa: Technical differentiation lies in the claims — not product appearance
exactTranslations.Testaa lisenssi-, sovinto-, luovutus- ta: Test a licence, settlement, assignment or financing route on auditable terms.
exactTranslations.Todistettu oikeusnäyttö ei korvaa teknis: Proven legal evidence does not replace technical, commercial or financial validation.
exactTranslations.Tämä on julkaistun patenttiselityksen yl: This is a plain-language summary of the published patent specification. Only the operative claims in the relevant country and a product-specific claim chart are determinative.
exactTranslations.Vahvista maa, haltija, maksu, rasite, op: Confirm country, proprietor, fee payment, encumbrance, operative claims and deadlines.
exactTranslations.Validoinnin vahvuus on epätasainen ja si: Uneven validation strength is explicitly classified
exactTranslations.Vasta toteutunut sopimus tai saaminen lu: Only an executed contract or receivable creates cash-flow evidence.
exactTranslations.Voiko suorituskyvyn saavuttaa kiertämäll: Can the performance be achieved by designing around the claims?
exactTranslations.• 1. Asiamiehen allekirjoittama omistus:
•  1. Counsel-signed title, encumbrance, fee-payment and rights matrix.
•  2. Claim charts for prioritised products and documented relevant sales.
•  3. Realised or contract-based cash flows and audited financial information.
•  4. Independent valuation and downside collateral analysis.
exactTranslations.• Seuraava päätös: hyväksytäänkö 90 päi: •  Next decision: approve a controlled 90-day diligence phase?
exactTranslations.• Markkinamittarit ovat hajanaisia: toi:
•  Market metrics are fragmented: shipments, taxes, litres and commercial estimates are not the same thing.
•  A family publication does not prove current validity or absence of encumbrances.
•  A court judgment alone does not prove paid damages or a global royalty base.
exactTranslations.• Ohjaus perustuu tallennettuihin resis:
•  Control is based on stored resistance–power values.
•  The power relationship is described as non-proportional.
•  User adjustment occurs between a non-zero minimum and a stored maximum.
exactTranslations.• Patenttiselitys antaa teknisen hypote:
•  The patent specification provides a technical hypothesis and documented protection text.
•  The German decision supports the link between certain products and claims 1 and 6.
•  Independent tests, teardown dossiers and claim charts for other countries are missing from the public evidence.
exactTranslations.• Valmistaja ostaa toimintarauhaa, oike:
•  A manufacturer buys freedom to operate, legal certainty or technology — if the relevant product and territory are established.
•  A technology provider evaluates integrability, freedom to operate and unit economics.
•  A financier evaluates title, realisable cash flow, control and downside value.
exactTranslations.Ehdollinen eteneminen: 90 päivän diligen: Conditional progression: 90-day diligence before a financing decision
exactTranslations.Kanada: 1.16 mrd CAD toimitusarvo. Saksa: Canada: CAD 1.16bn shipment value. Germany: 1.518m litres of taxed liquid in 2025 (provisional). The metrics are not summed.
exactTranslations.Kaupallinen $26,0–46,32 mrd haarukka on: The commercial USD 26.0–46.32bn range is a reasonableness check — not Atlas's own global estimate.
exactTranslations.Kirjattu haltija, prioriteetti ja EPO:n: The recorded proprietor, priority and central EPO outcome can be confirmed. Current national status, encumbrances and enforcement across the family require further evidence.
exactTranslations.Markkina-aineisto on läpinäkyvä mutta ei: The market evidence is transparent but not yet ready as a global value
The current evidence supports further diligence. It does not yet by itself support a specific loan amount, equity value or patent collateral value.
exactTranslations.Pankkikelpoisuus paranee eniten, kun näm: Financeability improves most when these four gaps are closed before any value discussion.
exactTranslations.Patentilla on dokumentoitu tekninen ydin: The patent has a documented technical core and material official legal evidence, but collateral value has not yet been proven.
exactTranslations.Patenttihistoria antaa vahvan mutta raja: Patent history provides a strong but limited anchor
exactTranslations.Puutteet ovat rajattavissa konkreettisek: The gaps can be scoped into a concrete work programme
exactTranslations.Rahoitusteesi perustuu näyttöön — ei mar: The financing thesis is based on evidence — not market hype
exactTranslations.Todistettu oikeusnäyttö on arvokasta vai: Proven legal evidence is valuable only with country-specific validity and product linkage.
exactTranslations.• 0–30 päivää: omistus-, rasite-, maksu:
•  Days 0–30: title, encumbrance, fee-payment and rights matrix.
•  Days 31–60: prioritised claim charts, market-sales scope and counterparty data.
•  Days 61–90: independent valuation, cash-flow scenarios and financing terms.
•  Decision gate: a structure based only on confirmed rights and repayment sources.
exactTranslations.• EPO pysytti patentin muutettuna; B2-j:
•  EPO maintained the patent in amended form; the B2 publication contains 9 claims.
•  Germany has official nullity and infringement decisions, but finality and territorial limits remain.
•  Financeability arises when rights, claim charts, cash flow and independent valuation are linked together.
exactTranslations.Arvioi oikeus, näyttö, myynti, vastapuol: Assess rights, evidence, sales, counterparty, cost and enforcement.
exactTranslations.• 1. Asiamiehen allekirjoittama omistus: •  1. Counsel-signed title, encumbrance, fee-payment and rights matrix.
exactTranslations.• 2. Priorisoitujen tuotteiden claim ch: •  2. Claim charts for prioritised products and documented relevant sales.
exactTranslations.• 3. Toteutuneet tai sopimuspohjaiset k: •  3. Realised or contract-based cash flows and audited financial information.
exactTranslations.• 4. Riippumaton arvonmääritys ja downs: •  4. Independent valuation and downside collateral analysis.
exactTranslations.• 1. Asiamiehen allekirjoittama omistus:
•  1. Counsel-signed title, encumbrance, fee-payment and rights matrix.
•  2. Claim charts for prioritised products and documented relevant sales.
•  3. Realised or contract-based cash flows and audited financial information.
•  4. Independent valuation and downside collateral analysis.
•  Next decision: approve a controlled 90-day diligence phase?
exactTranslations.• EPO-rekisteri: patentti pysytetty muu:
•  EPO Register: the patent was maintained as amended after opposition proceedings; the B2 patent specification was published. EP3032975B2 contains 9 claims.
•  Germany: two official decisions; finality and territorial limits remain.
•  Financeability arises when rights, claim charts, cash flow and independent valuation are linked together.
exactTranslations.Kaupallinen 26,0–46,32 mrd USD haarukka: The commercial USD 26.0–46.32bn range is a reasonableness check — not Atlas's own global estimate.
exactTranslations.Kanada: 1,16 mrd CAD toimitusarvo. Saksa: Canada: CAD 1.16bn shipment value. Germany: 1.518m litres of taxed liquid in 2025 (provisional). The metrics are not summed.
exactTranslations.EPO-rekisteri: patentti pysytetty muutet: EPO Register: patent maintained as amended after opposition; B2 published on 24 April 2024.
exactTranslations.Julkisen rekisterin kirjattu haltija: Pi: Recorded proprietor in the public register: Pixan Oy. Current national validity, fees and encumbrances across the family have not yet been verified.
exactTranslations.• Patenttiselitys antaa teknisen hypote:
•  The patent specification provides a technical hypothesis and documented protection text.
•  Germany: the decision supports the link between certain products and claims 1 and 6.
•  Independent tests, teardown dossiers and claim charts for other countries are missing from the public evidence.
exactTranslations.Saksa: nestemallin luottamustaso on mata: Germany: the liquid model has low confidence and a range of EUR 667.92–1,654.62 million; it must not be presented as observed sales.
exactTranslations.• EPO:n muutettu EP3032975B2 ja Saksan:
•  The amended EP3032975B2 and Germany's two official decisions form a legal-evidence anchor.
•  The market dataset spans a 195-country research frame, but there are 0 comparable retail-value donors.
•  A financing structure requires national rights, a claim-mapped-sales bridge, cash flow and independent valuation.
exactTranslations.EPO:n keskitetty riitautus päättyi paten: The central EPO opposition concluded with the patent maintained as amended
exactTranslations.Tarkasteltujen tuotteiden todettiin louk: The products examined were found to infringe the patent
exactTranslations.• Ketjun alku on osin vahvistettu viral:
•  The beginning of the chain is partly confirmed by official sources.
•  The product and sales link is confirmed only to a limited extent: Germany, 7 O 3341/24.
•  Evidence of contracts, payments, company finances and collateral value is missing from the public package.
exactTranslations.EPO:n keskitetty väite- ja valitusmenett: The central EPO opposition and appeal proceedings have concluded; national post-grant status remains separate.
exactTranslations.Virallinen tuomio on saatavilla; valitus: The official judgment is available; appeal status, finality and enforcement have not been independently confirmed in this publication.
exactTranslations.Vahvista Australian seuraava uusiminen h: Confirm the next Australian renewal immediately
exactTranslations.Suomen 14. vuosimaksu erääntyy: Finland's year-14 renewal fee is due
exactTranslations.Täsmäytä jokainen eurooppalainen kansall: Reconcile every European national right before the payment cycle
exactTranslations.Vahvista ja hoida Yhdysvaltain 7,5 vuode: Confirm and pay the United States 7.5-year maintenance fee
exactTranslations.37 evidenssimerkintää; universumin YK-os: 37 evidence observations; the UN component of the universe comprises 193 Member States.
exactTranslations.1,16 mrd CAD toimitusarvo; 1 251 843 l n: CAD 1.16bn shipment value; 1,251,843 l of liquid
exactTranslations.Virallinen koko vuoden toimitusarvo tukk: The official full-year shipment value to wholesalers or retailers covers all four reported product categories.
The official full-year shipment value to wholesalers or retailers covers all four reported product categories. It is not consumer retail purchases, and Health Canada may revise the data.
exactTranslations.Ei havaittua myyntiä. Laskelma kertoo vu: Not observed sales. The provisional 2025 taxed-liquid volume is multiplied by three 2026 prices from one German online shop. The year mismatch, single-shop basket, product mix and excluded categories make confidence low.
exactTranslations.Hyväksyttävä maailmanestimaatti tarvitse: A global estimate needs ≥3 comparable markets
exactTranslations.• Vahva lähtökohta: dokumentoitu patent:
•  Strong starting point: a documented patent core and official German legal evidence.
•  Critical open work: national rights, claim-mapped sales, cash flow and downside value.
•  Recommendation: conditional 90-day diligence, clear decision gates and an access-controlled data room.
•  This public package is a reviewable evidence map, not Pixan Oy's official position or a financing recommendation.
exactTranslations.Mitätöintikanne hylättiin; valitus virei: Nullity action dismissed; appeal pending (14 January 2026)
exactTranslations.Virallinen tuomio hylkäsi EP3032975B2:n: The official judgment dismissed the nullity action concerning the German part of EP3032975B2. The official register records an appeal to the Federal Court of Justice under case number X ZR 21/26. Not final while the BGH appeal is pending.
exactTranslations.Tarkasteltujen tuotteiden todettiin louk: The products examined were found to infringe the patent (2 April 2026)
exactTranslations.Virallinen tuomio katsoi tarkasteltujen: The official judgment found that the products examined directly infringed claims 1 and 6 and indirectly infringed them in relation to supplementary components, and ordered the remedies listed in the judgment. The official judgment is available; appeal status, finality and enforcement have not been independently confirmed in this publication.
exactTranslations.Uusi-Seelanti 2024: virallinen retail-al: New Zealand 2024: official retail lower bound
exactTranslations.4/4 ehdokasta hylättiin D1–D10-protokoll: 4/4 candidates failed the D1–D10 protocol; the accepted-donor gate is 0/3.
exactTranslations.Uuden-Seelannin luku on puutteellinen er: The New Zealand figure is an incomplete specialist-retail lower bound, and the EU figure is a supported benchmark based on an external study. The commercial USD 26.0–46.32bn range is only a reasonableness check; the measures are not summed.
exactTranslations.4/4 ehdokasta ei läpäissyt D1–D10-protok: 4/4 candidates failed the D1–D10 protocol; the accepted-donor gate is 0/3.
exactTranslations.Uuden-Seelannin luku on alaraja ja EU-lu: The New Zealand figure is a lower bound, and the EU figure is a supported institutional benchmark. The commercial USD 26.0–46.32bn range and Germany's EUR 667.92m–1,654.62m liquid model are cross-checks, not the atlas's global estimate.
exactTranslations.• EPO:n muutettu EP3032975B2 ja Saksan:
•  The amended EP3032975B2 and two official German decisions anchor the legal evidence.
•  The market dataset contains 20 official annual observations from 6 countries, but the donor gate is 0/3.
•  A financing structure requires national rights, a claim-mapped-sales bridge, cash flow and an independent valuation.
exactTranslations.20 virallista havaintoa 6 maasta mittaav: 20 official observations from 6 countries measure different things
exactTranslations.vähintään 280 milj. NZD; puutteellinen e: at least NZD 280m; incomplete specialist-retail lower bound
exactTranslations.EU:n vertailuarvo tukee mittaluokan rist: The EU benchmark supports a scale cross-check; the commercial range is wide because product scopes and methods may differ.
exactTranslations.EU-luku perustuu ulkopuoliseen tutkimuks: The EU figure is based on an external study and is not a national donor market. The estimates are compared, not summed or used automatically as a royalty base.
exactTranslations.Nykyinen hyväksytty donor-portti on 0/3;: The current accepted-donor gate is 0/3; all 4 candidates remain outside the count.
exactTranslations.• Jokaisen ehdokkaan on läpäistävä kaik:
•  Every candidate must pass all 10 criteria (D1–D10).
•  New Zealand's lower bound, the EU benchmark, Canada's shipment proxy and Germany's liquid model were rejected as donors for disclosed reasons.
•  Coverage across regions and regulatory types, plus direct validation in major economies, is still required.
exactTranslations.Uusi-Seelanti 2024: 29 tiedoston raakasu: New Zealand 2024: raw sum from 29 files
exactTranslations.Uuden-Seelannin raakasumma täsmää virall: New Zealand's raw sum reconciles to the official ≥NZD 280m headline. The NZD 264.561m sensitivity from removing exact repeated rows is not a corrected estimate; the identified-vaping raw sum is NZD 274.18m. The EU figure is a supported benchmark, and the commercial USD 26.0–46.32bn range is only a reasonableness check; the measures are not summed.

New Zealand's raw sum reconciles to the official ≥NZD 280m headline; the NZD 264.561m repeated-row sensitivity is not a corrected estimate, and the identified-vaping raw sum is NZD 274.18m. The EU figure is a supported institutional benchmark. The commercial USD 26.0–46.32bn range and Germany's EUR 667.92m–1,654.62m liquid model are cross-checks, not the atlas's global estimate.
exactTranslations.otsikko vähintään 280 milj. NZD; 280,685: headline at least NZD 280m; NZD 280.685m raw sum from 29 files; NZD 264.561m sensitivity from removing repeated rows, not a corrected estimate
exactTranslations.• Jokaisen ehdokkaan on läpäistävä kaik:
•  Every candidate must pass all 10 criteria (D1–D10).
•  New Zealand's NZD 280.685m raw sum and NZD 264.561m repeated-row sensitivity are not a cleaned estimate; the EU benchmark, Canada's shipment proxy and Germany's liquid model were also rejected as donors.
•  Coverage across regions and regulatory types, plus direct validation in major economies, is still required.
exactTranslations.Uuden-Seelannin raakasumma täsmää virall: New Zealand's raw sum reconciles to the official ≥NZD 280m headline. The NZD 264.561m sensitivity from removing exact repeated rows is not a corrected estimate; the identified-vaping raw sum is NZD 274.18m. The EU figure is a supported benchmark based on commercial Euromonitor 2025 data; Cyprus, Luxembourg and Malta are missing. The commercial USD 26.0–46.32bn range is only a reasonableness check; the measures are not summed.

New Zealand's raw sum reconciles to the official ≥NZD 280m headline; the NZD 264.561m repeated-row sensitivity is not a corrected estimate, and the identified-vaping raw sum is NZD 274.18m. The EU figure is a supported institutional benchmark based on commercial Euromonitor 2025 data; Cyprus, Luxembourg and Malta are missing. The commercial USD 26.0–46.32bn range and Germany's EUR 667.92m–1,654.62m liquid model are cross-checks, not the atlas's global estimate.
exactTranslations.EU-luku perustuu kaupalliseen Euromonito: The EU figure is based on commercial Euromonitor 2025 data; Cyprus, Luxembourg and Malta are missing. It is not a national donor market. The estimates are compared, not summed or used automatically as a royalty base.

deterministicRules.unchanged: Identifiers, dates, formulas, page numbers, numeric values, proper source names and text already in English remain unchanged.
